name: telemetryStats
invariants: output.ok === false || (output.result.count === 0 ? output.result.overall === null : output.result.overall !== null)
_note: Aggregates the caller's telemetry samples (avgFps/worstP95/totalJankFrames/avgHitstop) from per-user STATE. With no samples it returns ok:true with an empty samples array, count 0 and overall:null (NEVER no_db). The assassin's internal owner actor has none → the empty shape.
